calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On The Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate
Off Calendar Nov-27-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER PETER ENGLERT's Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate.

Petitioner Peter Englert's petition for writ of administrative mandate is denied. Per federal law, all nonconflicting California traffic laws are applicable in federal enclaves including the Presidio. There is no federal law applicable to federal enclaves that conflicts with California's law authorizing the DMV's administrative suspension of Mr. Englert's driver's license. The fact that Mr. Englert was cited and may be prosecuted for violating a federal regulation rather than a California statute prohibiting driving while intoxicated or driving with an excessive blood alcohol level does not preclude DMV's ability to apply California administrative per se procedure to Mr. Englert. Neither due process nor any other federal right of Mr. Englert is violated by the DMV's administrative suspension of his license.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
